content:
{
  "sentences": [
    {
      "text": "可以給我一杯水嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yì bēi shuǐ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi4 bei1 shui3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a glass of water?",
      "translation_ko": "물 한 잔 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我點一杯拿鐵嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ diǎn yì bēi nátǐ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 dian3 yi4 bei1 na2tie3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me order a latte?",
      "translation_ko": "라떼 한 잔 주문해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我菜單嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ càidān ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 cai4dan1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me the menu?",
      "translation_ko": "메뉴판 좀 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我拿一個袋子嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ ná yí ge dàizi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 na2 yi2 ge5 dai4zi5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me get a bag?",
      "translation_ko": "봉투 하나 가져다 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我發票嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ fāpiào ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 fa1piao4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me the receipt?",
      "translation_ko": "영수증 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我加珍珠嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiā zhēnzhū ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 jia1 zhen1zhu1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you add boba for me?",
      "translation_ko": "타피오카 펄 추가해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一杯紅茶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yì bēi hóngchá ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi4 bei1 hong2cha2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a cup of black tea?",
      "translation_ko": "홍차 한 잔 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我點一杯綠茶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ diǎn yì bēi lǜchá ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 dian3 yi4 bei1 lü4cha2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me order a green tea?",
      "translation_ko": "녹차 한 잔 주문해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我小杯的嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ xiǎo bēi de ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 xiao3 bei1 de5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a small cup?",
      "translation_ko": "작은 컵으로 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我換成中杯嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ huàn chéng zhōng bēi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 huan4 cheng2 zhong1 bei1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you change it to a medium cup for me?",
      "translation_ko": "중간 컵으로 바꿔 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我大杯的拿鐵嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ dà bēi de nátǐ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 da4 bei1 de5 na2tie3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a large latte?",
      "translation_ko": "라떼 큰 컵으로 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我加半糖嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiā bàn táng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 jia1 ban4 tang2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you add half sugar for me?",
      "translation_ko": "반당으로 해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我微糖的嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ wēi táng de ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 wei1 tang2 de5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a low-sugar one?",
      "translation_ko": "당도 약간 적게 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我做成正常甜嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ zuò chéng zhèngcháng tián ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 zuo4 cheng2 zheng4chang2 tian2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you make it with normal sweetness?",
      "translation_ko": "보통 당도로 해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我去冰的嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ qù bīng de ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 qu4 bing1 de5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me one with no ice?",
      "translation_ko": "얼음 빼고 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我加少冰嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ jiā shǎo bīng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 jia1 shao3 bing1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you add less ice for me?",
      "translation_ko": "얼음 적게 넣어 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我冰的嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ bīng de ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 bing1 de5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me an iced one?",
      "translation_ko": "얼음 넣어 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我外帶嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ wàidài ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 wai4dai4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you make it to-go for me?",
      "translation_ko": "포장해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我內用嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ nèiyòng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 nei4yong4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can I have it for here?",
      "translation_ko": "매장에서 먹을게요."
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我拿一根吸管嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ ná yì gēn xīguǎn ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 na2 yi4 gen1 xi1guan3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you get me a straw?",
      "translation_ko": "빨대 하나 가져다 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一隻湯匙嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yì zhī tāngchí ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi4 zhi1 tang1chi2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a spoon?",
      "translation_ko": "숟가락 하나 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我拿叉子嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ ná chāzi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 na2 cha1zi5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you get me a fork?",
      "translation_ko": "포크 가져다 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我衛生紙嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ wèishēngzhǐ ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 wei4sheng1zhi3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a tissue?",
      "translation_ko": "휴지 좀 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我算一下價錢嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ suàn yíxià jiàqián ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 suan4 yi2xia4 jia4qian2 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me calculate the price?",
      "translation_ko": "가격 좀 계산해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以等我一下嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ děng wǒ yíxià ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 deng3 wo3 yi2xia4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you wait for me a moment?",
      "translation_ko": "잠시만 기다려 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以再說一次嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ zài shuō yí cì ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 zai4 shuo1 yi2 ci4 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you say it again?",
      "translation_ko": "한 번 더 말씀해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以說慢一點嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ shuō màn yìdiǎn ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 shuo1 man4 yi4dian3 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you speak a little slower?",
      "translation_ko": "조금 천천히 말씀해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我點一杯豆漿嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ diǎn yì bēi dòujiāng ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 dian3 yi4 bei1 dou4jiang1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you help me order a soy milk?",
      "translation_ko": "두유 한 잔 주문해 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以給我一個袋子嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ gěi wǒ yí ge dàizi ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 gei3 wo3 yi2 ge5 dai4zi5 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you give me a bag?",
      "translation_ko": "봉투 하나 주시겠어요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "可以幫我拿菜單嗎？",
      "pinyin": "Kěyǐ bāng wǒ ná càidān ma?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ke3yi3 bang1 wo3 na2 cai4dan1 ma0",
      "translation_en": "Can you get me the menu?",
      "translation_ko": "메뉴판 가져다 주시겠어요?"
    }
  ]
}
